title: [Ibis] Nightly Tests Failed w/ Valgrind
body:
Tracking issue for Valgrind failure on an Ibis test observed here: https://github.com/llvm/circt/actions/runs/6338557115/job/17215924247#step:6:4290

The error is reproduced below:
```
******************** TEST 'CIRCT :: Dialect/Ibis/Transforms/reblock.mlir' FAILED ********************
Exit Code: 123

Command Output (stderr):
--
RUN: at line 1: /__w/circt/circt/build/bin/circt-opt --pass-pipeline='builtin.module(ibis.class(ibis.method(ibis-reblock)))' /__w/circt/circt/test/Dialect/Ibis/Transforms/reblock.mlir | /__w/circt/circt/build/bin/FileCheck /__w/circt/circt/test/Dialect/Ibis/Transforms/reblock.mlir
+ /__w/circt/circt/build/bin/circt-opt '--pass-pipeline=builtin.module(ibis.class(ibis.method(ibis-reblock)))' /__w/circt/circt/test/Dialect/Ibis/Transforms/reblock.mlir
+ /__w/circt/circt/build/bin/FileCheck /__w/circt/circt/test/Dialect/Ibis/Transforms/reblock.mlir
==21379== Invalid read of size 8
==21379==    at 0x1635920: (anonymous namespace)::ReblockPass::runOnOperation() (in /__w/circt/circt/build/bin/circt-opt)
```
